mechanics.excerpt: Also_ if the character is lost; Skill Check can be used to find his way t0 civilization_ PERCEPTION Simply put, this is the Skill of noticing things; using your senses to perceive the world around you and interpreting that information quickly and accurately: AlI characters have some level of Perception Skill, but only trained observers have high 103
